query: SELECT f.empresa, f.mesano, COUNT(*) as qtd, SUM(CAST(f.financiado AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_financiado FROM febraban f INNER JOIN consignados c ON c.nrOperacao = f.proposta WHERE LOWER(TRIM(c.restricaoSRCC)) = 'sim' GROUP BY f.empresa, f.mesano ORDER BY f.empresa, f.mesano DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT f.empresa, f.mesano, COUNT(*) as qtd, SUM(CAST(f.financiado AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_financiado FROM febraban f INNER JOIN consignados c ON c.nrOperacao = f.proposta WHERE LOWER(TRIM(c.restricaoSRCC)) = 'sim' GROUP BY f.empresa, f.mesano ORDER BY f.empresa, f.mesano DESC;
